artista: World Library of Folk & Primitive Music

tracks.titulo: 1-3: Panpipes Of The Puinabe, Maquiritare, Guaharibo Song / 4-6: Hungle Hunting Cries, Curing Song Of The Sheriana, Curing Song
7-11: Bark Horns Of The Piaroa, Masked Dance Of The Piaroa, Horn Orchestra, Manioc Scraping Song, Initiation Song
12: Trompa Guajira / 13: La Chipola / 14: La Hornada / 15: Canto De Ganado (Cattle Herding Song) / 16: Pasaje La Victoria / 17-18: Corrido, Passaje La Burra
19: Polo / 20: Canto Para Pilar Maiz (Corn Grinding Song) / 21: Zumba, Que Zumba (How It Hums)
22-29: El Tamanangue (22: La Batalla / 23: La Bella / 24: La Perrendenga / 25: La Juruminga / 26: Poco A Poco / 27: El Galerón / 28: Seis Por Ocho / 29: A Salve)
30-31: Quitiplas (Stamping Tubes), Carangano / 32: Fulia - Se Fué Volando / 33: El Mampulorio / 34: Tambor Grande / 35: "Remate" Playing / 36: Tambore Redondo (Round Drum)
